event.title: Sunday Morning Worship
event.description: Weekly worship service followed by fellowship. Rebecca leads the opening devotional once a month.

event.title: Congregational Care Visit Training
event.description: Hands-on session for the pastoral care team on listening, presence, and safe boundaries. Led by Rebecca Price with Deacon Charles Mosley.

event.title: Spring Food Pantry Drive
event.description: Collection and sorting for the neighborhood pantry. Canned goods, dry goods, and peanut butter go the furthest.

event.title: Annual Community Health Fair Planning Kickoff
event.description: First planning meeting for the next health fair. Confirm exhibitor tables, volunteer leads, and the program schedule.

event.title: Fall Festival and Trunk or Treat
event.description: Annual fall festival for families. Rebecca emcees. Trunk or treat in the parking lot, games, and food.
